titleStmt.title: SII 40.224: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 224. (A.R. No. B. 269 of 1933.) Dhūḷipāḷḷa, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone planted before the temple of Gōpālasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1679, Dhātu, Chaitra, śu. 5.

Records the construction of a temple along with tower and consecration of the god Vēṇugōpālasvāmi at Dhūlipāḷḷa in Bellaṁkoṇḍa-sīma by a certain Bāli-Śeṭṭi of Tāḷḷūru, who belonged to the Manukula-gōtra, with the premission of Rājaśri Malrāju Veṅkaṭanarasiṁha-Rāyaniṅgāru. Reference is also made to a gift of land to Guṇḍōju and Kāśe Gōpāḷa, who constructed the temple, and also shares in lands to temple-servants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bbulu 1679 Agunēṭi dhāta nā
ma saṁvvatsara caitra śu 5 lu bellaṁkoṁḍa
śīmalōnu dhūḷipāḷlalōnu śrī vēṇugō
pālasvāmiki rājaśrīmalrāju veṁkkaṭa
naraśiṁhvarāyaniṁggāri śalvunanu mā
nukula gōtṛlaina tāḷlūri mūrtiśeṭṭi pau
tṛlaina gurviśeṭṭi putṛlaina bāliśeṭṭi dēvā
layaṁ kaṭṭiṁcci gōpuraṁ kaṭṭiṁcci prati
ṣṭha ceyiṁcci vucchavaṁ ceyiṁccināḍu
yī devaḷaṁ kaṭṭina guṁḍḍōju kāśagōpā
ḷuku yīgrāmāna tūrpu polānanu
gorteḍucēnu mānyaṁ yippiṁccināḍu

Ācā
lama
vritti kha 1
maddaliṁ
mallēkha
madaliya
pa Iki kha
mōkari
kha 3 mu
rijalaka kha
kāmaka kha
bayaka kha
Irugā kha
gōdhaśakha 2
Eṟṟaka
ṁkhumela
nuniki kha 1
gōḍamamu
niki kha 1
śamani
Digital edition of SII 40.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
